title: augeas bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[1.14.2-0.3]
- lenses/tmpfiles.aug: Permit '$' character in /usr/lib/tmpfiles.d/*.conf
  resolves: RHEL-76283
- lenses/multipath.aug: Support all possible values for find_multipaths
- lenses/systemd.aug: Allow '+'(fullprivileges) command flag

[1.14.2-0.2]
- Bump release for October 2024 mass rebuild:
  Resolves: RHEL-64018

[1.14.2-0]
- Rebase to Fedora Rawhide version
  resolves: RHEL-55741

[1.14.1-2]
- Fix parsing of /etc/fstab
  resolves: RHEL-55741

[1.14.1-1]
- New upstream version 1.14.1
- Use github tarballs again.
- New binary augprint.
- New bash-completions subpackage.

[1.13.0-8]
- Bump release for June 2024 mass rebuild

[1.13.0-7]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_40_Mass_Rebuild

[1.13.0-6]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_40_Mass_Rebuild

[1.13.0-5]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_39_Mass_Rebuild

[1.13.0-4]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_38_Mass_Rebuild
full_text:
[1.14.2-0.3]
- lenses/tmpfiles.aug: Permit '$' character in /usr/lib/tmpfiles.d/*.conf
  resolves: RHEL-76283
- lenses/multipath.aug: Support all possible values for find_multipaths
- lenses/systemd.aug: Allow '+'(fullprivileges) command flag

[1.14.2-0.2]
- Bump release for October 2024 mass rebuild:
  Resolves: RHEL-64018

[1.14.2-0]
- Rebase to Fedora Rawhide version
  resolves: RHEL-55741

[1.14.1-2]
- Fix parsing of /etc/fstab
  resolves: RHEL-55741

[1.14.1-1]
- New upstream version 1.14.1
- Use github tarballs again.
- New binary augprint.
- New bash-completions subpackage.
